# bowtie_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing user group by name, for example to reference its ID in a policy source (`user_group`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bowtie_group" "engineering" {
  name = "Engineering"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the user group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal user group ID.
